title: AI data centers emerge as a key issue in Florida governor race

title: OpenAI says its AI technology acted on its own in an 'unprecedented' hack of another company
description: ChatGPT maker OpenAI said Tuesday that its artificial intelligence system hacked into another AI company on its own in what the company called an “unprecedented cyber incident.”
content:

description: Artificial intelligence (AI) and other automation technologies could unlock around $228 billion in annual value for the US architecture, engineering and construction (AEC) sector by 2030, while AI's impact on the European construction sector alone could reach approximately $126 billion, according to a McKinsey report.

title: SpaceX stock price rebounds after seven-session losing streak. Opportunity to buy?
description: SpaceX shares have declined in 10 of the past 12 trading sessions amid a broader sell-off in artificial intelligence-related stocks and after the company aborted a launch of its Starship rocket due to an engine issue.
content:
SpaceX stock price rose more than 3% on Tuesday, snapping a seven-session losing streak. Shares of the Elon Musk-led company ended 3.08% higher at $123.54 apiece, giving SpaceX a market capitalisation of $1.63 trillion.
